capa_risk_items.title: High-risk vendor tray defect recurrence
capa_risk_items.recommended_action: Escalate to executive review and require vendor corrective action update.

capa_risk_items.title: Repeated wet tray process failures
capa_risk_items.recommended_action: Treat as immediate governance escalation due to overdue high-risk status.

capa_risk_items.title: Incomplete documentation during audit readiness review
capa_risk_items.recommended_action: Assign manager follow-up and verify documentation closure before due date.

capa_risk_items.title: Vendor IFU mismatch requires monitoring
capa_risk_items.recommended_action: Monitor vendor response and link to CAPA if recurrence is detected.

executive_recommendations: Review overdue and critical CAPAs first during executive governance huddles.
Use risk_score and executive_priority to sequence CAPA follow-up instead of relying only on due date.
Connect vendor-linked CAPAs to Vendor Governance performance scoring.
Use Power BI exports to trend high-risk CAPA recurrence and closure performance.

next_actions.action: Create frontend CAPA Predictive Risk Scorecard cards.
next_actions.rationale: Make risk-prioritized CAPA intelligence visible to leaders.

next_actions.action: Connect predictive CAPA scoring to persistent CAPA records.
next_actions.rationale: Move from demo-safe deterministic scoring to live operational scoring.

next_actions.action: Add Power BI fields for risk_score, risk_band, and executive_priority.
next_actions.rationale: Enable executive dashboard filtering and trend analysis.

strategic_theme: CAPA Governance -> Predictive CAPA Risk Scoring -> Executive Prioritization -> Governance Intelligence
